note: Falsifiable visual questions for the multimodal judge (verify-and-evals.md §2.5, §3.5). Unused until the judge lands (phase 6/7); authored now so the task is complete. Every question is yes/no and answerable from a screenshot alone — never 'does it look good'.

questions.ask: Are exactly three cards visible in a single horizontal row?
Does any card overlap another card or the header/footer?
Is the header bar flush against the top edge and the footer flush against the bottom edge?
Is any text clipped, truncated, or overflowing its card?
Are the three cards stacked vertically, each spanning nearly the full width?
Do the header and footer still span the full width?
